name: Claude Pro Instructions
beforeApproval:
1. Open claude.ai and sign in to your account.
2. Click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner of the screen.
3. Select Settings, then click on Account.
4. Your Organization ID is displayed in UUID format (e.g. 714fe120-d7yd-4da9-bb53-84c42f10wac7).
afterApproval:
1. Open claude.ai and sign in to your account.
2. Click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner.
3. Navigate to Settings → Billing.
4. Your plan should now display as **Claude Pro** with an active status.
5. You can confirm by starting a conversation — Pro users have access to Claude Opus and extended usage limits.

name: ChatGPT Session Instructions
beforeApproval:
1. Open chatgpt.com and sign in to your account.
2. Press F12 to open DevTools, then click the Application tab.
3. In the left panel, expand Storage → Cookies → https://chatgpt.com.
4. Find the cookie named **__Secure-next-auth.session-token** and copy its full value.
5. Paste the entire JSON value into the Session Details field below.
afterApproval:
1. Open chatgpt.com and sign in to your account.
2. Click your profile icon → Settings → My Plan.
3. Your plan should now display as **ChatGPT Plus** with an active status.
4. If you do not see the upgrade after 10 minutes, please contact us on WeChat.

name: GrokSuper Instructions
beforeApproval:
1. Open grok.com and sign in to your account.
2. Click your profile icon in the top-right corner.
3. Select Settings, then click on Account.
4. Your Organization ID is displayed under your account details.
afterApproval:
1. Open grok.com and sign in to your account.
2. Click your profile icon → Settings → Subscription.
3. Your plan should now display as **GrokSuper** with an active status.
4. For any assistance, please reach out via WeChat.
